name: New Mountain Finance Corp
business: New Mountain Finance Corp (NMFC) is a business development company that provides direct lending solutions to U.S. upper middle market companies backed by private equity sponsors. It invests primarily in senior secured loans and select junior capital positions in growing businesses in defensive industries.

exposures.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, our top five industry concentrations were software, business services, healthcare, investment funds (which includes our investments in our joint ventures) and consumer services.
